title: woodsiopsis obtusa subsp. occidentalis
intro: Woodsiopsis obtusa subsp. occidentalis is a plant species belonging to the family Woodsiaceae, which is commonly known as a type of fern. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Woodsiopsis obtusa subsp. occidentalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the dried fronds in hot water or using it as a tincture, and it is also used in traditional remedies for its potential to alleviate various health issues.
